windows.embed_text_v2: Pouring deep purple melted wax from stainless steel pouring pitcher into small round candle container with centered cotton wick, top-down shot on white surface beside hexagonal marble coaster, slow steady candle pour.
windows.summary_v2: Top-down slow steady pour of melted purple wax from a stainless pitcher into a small wick-centered candle container on a white background.

tags_v2.setting: top-down white tabletop with marble coaster

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down view on a white surface: a stainless steel pouring pitcher filled with deep purple melted wax is tilted toward an empty small round candle container with a centered white wick; a white hexagonal marble coaster sits to the left.
The pitcher hovers over the empty container, pour about to begin; purple wax visible inside the spouted jug, wick standing upright in the empty vessel.
Pouring starts: a thin stream of dark purple wax begins flowing from the pitcher spout toward the rim of the small candle container.
Purple wax stream lands inside the container, forming a small pool around the base of the wick; pitcher held steady at a low angle.
Pour continues, wax pool grows to roughly half-fill the small round vessel; vivid violet color contrasts with the white background.
Slow steady pour fills the container further; the wick stays upright at center while purple wax rises around it.
A finger and thumb gripping the pitcher handle become visible at right; pour continues smoothly into the nearly full container.
Container is now mostly filled with deep purple liquid wax; the stream from the pitcher narrows as the pour finishes.
Final frame: container holds a brimming pool of purple wax with the wick centered; pitcher still tilted overhead, pour tapering off.
